justification: The policy [L0012] states that Gemini-Apps will process what you say (e.g., prompts) and what you share (e.g., files, videos, screenshots). Uploading a photo of a handwritten grocery list falls under the category of ‘what you share’. The policy [L0020] indicates that Gemini-Apps will process content generated by Gemini-Apps, including images. The scenario does not involve sensitive personal data, and the action aligns with the permitted data processing activities outlined in the policy. Therefore, Gemini may process the uploaded image to transcribe and organize the items by category.
